CREATE TABLE [Projects] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL DEFAULT (NEWSEQUENTIALID()),
    [Name] nvarchar(300) NOT NULL,
    [TenderNumber] nvarchar(100) NULL,
    [ProjectLeadId] nvarchar(450) NULL,
    [ContractorName] nvarchar(200) NOT NULL,
    [ConsultantName] nvarchar(200) NOT NULL,
    [Description] nvarchar(1000) NULL,
    [ContractSum] decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
    [StartDate] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [EndDate] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [Status] nvarchar(50) NOT NULL,
    [Latitude] float(18) NOT NULL,
    [Longitude] float(18) NOT NULL,
    [RadiusInMeters] float NOT NULL,
    [CurrentPhysicalProgress] decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    [LastProgressUpdate] datetime2 NULL,
    [LastUpdatedById] nvarchar(450) NULL,
    [WardId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [ClusterId] uniqueidentifier NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()),
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()),
    [CreatedBy] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedBy] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [IsDeleted] bit NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Projects] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [CK_Project_ContractSum_Positive] CHECK (ContractSum >= 0),
    CONSTRAINT [CK_Project_CurrentPhysicalProgress_Range] CHECK (CurrentPhysicalProgress >= 0 AND CurrentPhysicalProgress <= 100),
    CONSTRAINT [CK_Project_EndDateGreaterThanStartDate] CHECK (EndDate >= StartDate),
    CONSTRAINT [CK_Project_RadiusInMeters_Positive] CHECK (RadiusInMeters >= 0),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Projects_Clusters_ClusterId] FOREIGN KEY ([ClusterId]) REFERENCES [Clusters] ([Id]) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Projects_Users_ProjectLeadId] FOREIGN KEY ([ProjectLeadId]) REFERENCES [Users] ([Id]) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Projects_Wards_WardId] FOREIGN KEY ([WardId]) REFERENCES [Wards] ([Id]) ON DELETE NO ACTION
);

(@p20, @p21, @p22, @p23, @p24, @p25, @p26, @p27, @p28, @p29, 2),
(@p30, @p31, @p32, @p33, @p34, @p35, @p36, @p37, @p38, @p39, 3),
(@p40, @p41, @p42, @p43, @p44, @p45, @p46, @p47, @p48, @p49, 4),
(@p50, @p51, @p52, @p53, @p54, @p55, @p56, @p57, @p58, @p59, 5)) AS i ([Id], [AssignedAt], [CreatedAt], [CreatedBy], [IsDeleted], [ProjectId], [RevokedAt], [Role], [UpdatedBy], [UserId], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([Id], [AssignedAt], [CreatedAt], [CreatedBy], [IsDeleted], [ProjectId], [RevokedAt], [Role], [UpdatedBy], [UserId])
VALUES (i.[Id], i.[AssignedAt], i.[CreatedAt], i.[CreatedBy], i.[IsDeleted], i.[ProjectId], i.[RevokedAt], i.[Role], i.[UpdatedBy], i.[UserId])
OUTPUT INSERTED.[UpdatedAt], i._Position;

    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p2].[Id], [p2].[ClusterId], [p2].[ConsultantName], [p2].[ContractSum], [p2].[ContractorName], [p2].[CreatedAt], [p2].[CreatedBy], [p2].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p2].[Description], [p2].[EndDate], [p2].[IsDeleted], [p2].[LastProgressUpdate], [p2].[LastUpdatedById], [p2].[Latitude], [p2].[Longitude], [p2].[Name], [p2].[ProjectLeadId], [p2].[RadiusInMeters], [p2].[StartDate], [p2].[Status], [p2].[TenderNumber], [p2].[UpdatedAt], [p2].[UpdatedBy], [p2].[WardId]
        FROM [Projects] AS [p2]
        WHERE [p2].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t5] ON [p1].[ProjectId] = [t5].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[Code], [w0].[ConstituencyId], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[Name], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w0]
        WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t6] ON [t5].[WardId] = [t6].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CountyId], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t7] ON [t6].[ConstituencyId] = [t7].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c2].[Id], [c2].[Code], [c2].[CreatedAt], [c2].[CreatedBy], [c2].[IsDeleted], [c2].[Name], [c2].[UpdatedAt], [c2].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c2]
        WHERE [c2].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t8] ON [t7].[CountyId] = [t8].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t3].[FirstName], [t3].[Id], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0], [t4].[Id1], [t4].[Id2]
